title: rubus × proximellus
intro:
Rubus × proximellus, also known as the hybrid raspberry or raspberry hybrid, is a cross between the American black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the purple raspberry (Rubus idaeus), resulting in a unique and hardy plant species.

This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins and other polyphenolic compounds, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties.

The health benefits of Rubus × proximellus include its ability to support cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and act as an antimicrobial agent, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies.

Rubus × proximellus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being, as well as to treat specific health conditions such as digestive issues and skin problems.
